brand_identity.name: Martin Lepage, PhD
brand_identity.title: AI Governance Consulting
brand_identity.mission: AI governance as decision machinery, not observability theater.
brand_identity.visual_metaphor: Blueprints, Precision Machinery, Clean Lines, Deep Depth

headings.usage: Use Weight 900 for Hero Headlines to feel 'Heavy'. Use 300 for elegant subheaders.

rules: No center-aligned hero text. Left align for 'Documentation' feel.
Use visible 1px grid lines (slate-200) to separate sections.
Generous whitespace: Section gaps should be min h-32.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold shadow-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-900 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-sm p-8 hover:border-violet-900/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-b-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-violet-900 rounded-none px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-slate-400

navigation.style: Fixed top, glassmorphism (white/90), 1px bottom border (slate-100). Logo left, Links right.

textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on all backgrounds.
Grid patterns in Hero and Footer.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width 1.5px, sharp). Use 'Compass' for CompassAI, 'Activity' for AurorAI.

media.image_style: Black and white or desaturated imagery with a single 'Tint' of Navy or Purple overlay. No full-color stock photos.

assets.description: Architectural Blueprint Lines - Set as background with low opacity (10-20%)
Clean minimal office - Use for About/Contact section (Desaturate via CSS)

landing.hero: Headline: 'Governance as Decision Machinery'. Sub: 'Martin Lepage, PhD'. CTA: 'Assess Your Governance'. Background: Blueprint Grid.
landing.services: Two distinct cards: 'AurorAI' (Shipping Systems) and 'CompassAI' (Agentic Governance). Use Bento Grid layout.

assessment_tool.style: Wizard Step Form. Clean, distraction-free. Progress bar top. Question big in center. Options as large clickable cards.

portfolio.style: Masonry grid of Case Studies. Each card looks like a 'File Folder' or 'Technical Report'.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot --legacy-peer-deps
THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement a dark mode toggle unless requested later. The brand is 'Airy/Professional'.

LOGOS: If logo files are missing, build them with Lucide Icons: Compass = , Monogram =
ML
TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, links, and inputs.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Slate-500 text is only used on White. Use Slate-900 for all critical reading.
accessibility.focus: Focus ring must be Violet-900 offset-2.
